topic.title: Uber| Phone Screen | USA | Sr SDE

post.content: Was asked some typical behavorial questions then https://leetcode.com/problems/word-search-ii/ \nI was able to solve it using trie but I ran out of time as I tried to feed in the test cases to execute the program. I am not really hopeful since I was not able to execute it in time.\n

approx how much time was left to code this problem after answering the behavioural questions ?
I believe a minimum of 25-30 minutes is needed to code it in an interview setup.

Also, can you elaborate whether the coding was on an IDE or a bare notepad/whiteboard type doc ?
